commit.message:
Claude/tender einstein drx2 n (#13)

* fix: add push/PR test job to CI; publish 5 Cursor affiliate articles

## CI workflow fix
The autonomous.yml only triggered on schedule/dispatch — no checks ran on
pushes or PRs, so GitHub showed "no status checks" on all PRs.

Split into two jobs:
- `test`: runs on every push to main and every PR against main. Fast — just
  `python -m unittest discover`. This is the required status check for PRs.
- `run-pipeline`: runs only on schedule/workflow_dispatch, requires `test` to
  pass first. Handles article generation and git push (write permission).

PRs will now show a green ✓ or red ✗ check from the `test` job.

## Cursor affiliate articles (5 published)
Pipeline generated the first batch of affiliate-priority articles:
- Cursor IDE vs GitHub Copilot: which AI code editor wins in 2026
- Cursor IDE vs VS Code: is it worth switching in 2026
- Cursor IDE review: hands-on for professional developers
- Cursor IDE vs Windsurf: best AI code editor comparison
- Best AI code editors in 2026: Cursor vs Copilot vs Windsurf ranked

All use the new keyword-aware template (real pricing, real features, real
tool names — not "Option A / Option B").

https://claude.ai/code/session_01958qSde5YeJex4JKosCH48

* ci: auto-merge claude/* PRs when tests pass

Adds a workflow that calls 'gh pr merge --auto --squash' on any PR
opened from a claude/* branch. GitHub queues the merge and executes
it automatically once all required status checks succeed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01958qSde5YeJex4JKosCH48

---------

commit.message:
Add dashboard enhancements: refresh, drill-down, cross-filter, KPI cards, fullscreen, global filters, editable titles

Implements Power BI / Tableau parity features for the Data Explorer dashboard:
- Store source SQL with pinned charts to enable refresh and drill-down
- Dashboard and chart titles are double-click-to-edit with DB persistence
- Per-chart refresh, Refresh All, and auto-refresh intervals (30s/1m/5m/15m)
- KPI metric cards for gauge and single-row numeric results
- Interactive drill-down with breadcrumb navigation (All > X > Y)
- Cross-filtering as default click behavior with purple ring indicator

commit.message:
feat(api): add audit logging for login and logout routes

Write auth actions (login success/failure, logout) to the audit_log
table via a fire-and-forget writeAuditLog function. Adds request
context middleware to capture user agent. Uses a typed AuditDetail
allow-list to prevent PII leaks — IP addresses are intentionally
excluded until scrubbing infrastructure is in place.

Also makes SessionContext.tenantId non-nullable since all valid
sessions require a tenant.

commit.message:
Fix office card showing wrong owner level — use _Owners as source of truth

The office card's "Role" line was reading ownerLevel from the _Offices
tab, which can be stale. Now looks up the owner's actual level from
_Owners data (AdminApp.state.owners) and falls back to _Offices only
if the owner isn't found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace third review with Ira D's Google review

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tts): Windows MCI for MP3 + mono s16p PyAV decode to eliminate noise

Two fixes:
1. Windows: use MCI (ctypes/winmm) as primary MP3 player — native, no deps,
   zero noise. PyAV+sounddevice kept as fallback for non-Windows.
2. PyAV decode: switch from s16 stereo to s16p mono. ElevenLabs TTS is mono;
   forcing stereo caused packing ambiguity that produced noisy audio.
   s16p planar + to_ndarray() gives clean (1, N) → flatten → sounddevice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  instead of a command that users couldn't discover
- Step 2 now guides users to /mcp auth flow instead of telling them to
  reinstall the plugin they already have
- All slash commands in identity skill use full plugin prefix (cog-bot:cog)
- Include .mcp.json OAuth fix (resource, audience, scope) and intent spec doc
